title: Adapter Remote Specd Data
description: The React IDE consumes `SpecdDataPort`, not raw `fetch`. The remote adapter implements every port method group over `/v1`, composing transport, optional bearer headers, and problem+json error mapping so UI hooks stay identical between web, desktop remote, and integration tests.
context: The React IDE consumes `SpecdDataPort`, not raw `fetch`. The remote adapter implements every port method group over `/v1`, composing transport, optional bearer headers, and problem+json error mapping so UI hooks stay identical between web, desktop remote, and integration tests.

rules.requirement: remote adapter composes transport bearer and problem-json layers
rules: The adapter MUST wrap `port-http-transport` with `adapter-bearer-auth` (when applicable) and `adapter-problem-json-errors`.

rules.requirement: remote adapter normalizes API base URL to /v1
rules: Configured API bases MUST be normalized so port methods target the versioned `/v1` root.

rules.requirement: remote adapter implements the full SpecdDataPort surface
rules: Every method on `client:specd-data-port` MUST be implemented against the HTTP routes defined in this change.

constraints: @specd/ui and @specd/client MUST NOT import @specd/core or @specd/sdk for kernel bootstrap.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.
